tasks.subject: Task 1: hashFile + FileHashes + compareHashes helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add hashFile (single-pass md5+sha1+sha256) and compareHashes helpers with unit tests. sha256File preserved for now; integration is Task 2.

**Files:**
- Modify: pack.go (add helpers)
- Modify: pack_test.go (add unit tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] FileHashes struct with MD5/SHA1/SHA256 string fields
- [ ] hashFile single I/O pass, lowercase hex
- [ ] compareHashes nil on match, per-hash diff on mismatch
- [ ] 7 unit tests pass

**Verify:** `go test ./... -run "TestHashFile|TestCompareHashes" -v && go vet ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pack.go", "pack_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./... -run \"TestHashFile|TestCompareHashes\" -v && go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hashFile single-pass", "compareHashes per-hash diff", "7 unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Manifest fields, version bump, integrate hashFile across pack/unpack/verify
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 4 hash fields to Manifest. Bump container 0x02→0x03 + FormatVersion 2→3. Rename sentinels SHA256→Hash. Replace all sha256File call sites with hashFile+compareHashes. Delete sha256File. Add per-hash tampering tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: manifest.go, pack.go, unpack.go, verify.go, main.go, pack_test.go, verify_test.go, inspect_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 6 hash fields populated; cross-check via hashFile passes
- [ ] Per-hash tamper detection: bin md5/sha1/sha256 → exit 5; scram md5/sha1/sha256 → exit 3 (Unpack and Verify)
- [ ] v0.2 containers rejected with new migration message
- [ ] sha256File removed
- [ ] go test ./... PASS; go vet clean

**Verify:** `go test ./... -v && go vet ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["manifest.go", "pack.go", "unpack.go", "verify.go", "main.go", "pack_test.go", "verify_test.go", "inspect_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./... -v && go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["6 hash fields populated", "per-hash tamper detection bin (md5/sha1/sha256)", "per-hash tamper detection scram (md5/sha1/sha256)", "Verify same matrix", "v0.2 rejection message", "sha256File deleted", "go test clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Inspect human-format display of all six hashes + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** inspect.go formatHumanInspect adds 4 lines (md5/sha1 for bin and scram) alongside existing sha256. JSON output passes through automatically. Tests assert all six hashes appear.

**Files:**
- Modify: inspect.go (formatHumanInspect)
- Modify: inspect_test.go (TestInspectShowsAllSixHashes, TestInspectJSONIncludesAllSixHashes)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 6 hash lines in human format
- [ ] 4 new keys in JSON
- [ ] existing inspect tests pass

**Verify:** `go test ./... -run TestInspect -v && go vet ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["inspect.go", "inspect_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./... -run TestInspect -v && go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["6 hash lines in human format", "4 new JSON keys", "existing inspect tests pass"]}
```
